name: Gail's Caviar Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop egg yolks and whites separately.
2. Mix the sour cream, egg yolks, and cottage cheese together in a bowl.
3. In a medium mixing bowl, layer: part of the chopped parsley, half of the cottage cheese mixture, scallions, and the remaining cottage cheese mixture.
4. Place an egg yolk in the center of the layered mixture.
5. Surround the egg yolk with a ring of caviar.
6. Sprinkle the rest of the chopped parsley around the bowl.
7. Squeeze lemon juice over the top of the spread.
8. Serve with crackers.
